verified_controls: every repair stage receipt binds the exact repair batch, source, provider, per-person status, hypothesis, plan, child lineage, and authority ceiling
repair receipts persist in the existing SQLite record_stage_evidence table rather than a shadow queue
an exact replay is idempotently retained
changed hypothesis or payload bytes fail the evidence-seal or idempotency check
stage checkpointing requires an owned live shard lease
repair-stage persistence never advances terminal record progress
repair-stage persistence cannot issue operational certificates or autonomous certified gold
